value.found_quote:
apps.<id>.tools.<tool>.enabled
boolean
Per-tool enabled override for an app tool (for example repos/list).
value.rationale: The page's configuration reference for Codex explicitly describes per-tool allow/deny controls for MCP tools and apps. Specifically, `apps.<id>.tools.<tool>.enabled` provides a per-tool enabled override (allow-listing), `apps.<id>.enabled` enables/disables an entire app/connector, `apps.<id>.default_tools_enabled` sets the default enabled state for all tools in an app, and `apps.<id>.tools.<tool>.approval_mode` controls approval behavior per tool. Additionally, `apps._default.destructive_enabled` and `apps._default.open_world_enabled` further control which categories of MCP tools are permitted. These config keys collectively implement MCP tool governance and allow-listing — controlling which MCP tools/resources the agent may use. The configuration appears to be generally available (active) with no preview/beta markers on these specific keys.
